mapper.sql: cg.code_group_seq , cg.code_group_id , cg.code_group_name , cg.description , cg.sort_order , cg.use_yn , cg.create_dt , cg.create_id , cg.create_ip , cg.modify_dt , cg.modify_id , cg.modify_ip , cg.status
mapper.select: SELECT cg.code_group_id AS value, cg.code_group_name AS label FROM code_group cg WHERE cg.use_yn = 'Y' AND (cg.status IS NULL OR cg.status = 'ACTIVE') ORDER BY cg.sort_order ASC, cg.code_group_seq ASC
